title: AI Chat
welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your AI assistant. How can I help you?
errorMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later.
todoCardHint: 📝 I've shown you the todo card where you can view and manage tasks directly.

fallbackResponses.1: Sorry, I can't connect to the server right now. Let's continue chatting!
fallbackResponses.2: There seems to be a network issue, but I'm still here with you.
fallbackResponses.3: Technical issues are temporarily blocking me, but this won't affect our conversation.

taskComplete.1: 🎉 Amazing! You just completed "{{task}}", I can feel your effort! We've taken another step forward!
taskComplete.2: ✨ Well done! Completing "{{task}}" makes us both stronger! Every small action builds strength!
taskComplete.3: 🌟 Great job! The success of "{{task}}" makes me proud of you, keep up the persistence!
taskComplete.4: 💪 Fantastic! Completing "{{task}}" shows your determination, your persistence fills me with strength!
taskComplete.5: 🎯 Task complete! Through "{{task}}" we're becoming better versions of ourselves! This is our hero's journey!

nodeUnlocked: 🎉 Awesome! You just lit up the "{{node}}" node, another star shines in our map! Keep going, we're getting stronger!
